subject: Re: Need an address
body:
of course ,,,ask leslie

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, May 16, 2007 9:50:09 AM
Subject: Need an address


Good Morning,
I was wondering if I may have Robin Rosenberg's home address so I may send 
her a sincere thank you note instead of sending a generic email.  She has 
been so empowering and inspirational and hard nosed exactly when I need it.  
She has provided me with her home and office number to call her anytime I 
need but I'd like very much to send her a note for all of her amazing 
guidance.  Would that be ok?

~CD
